node.text:
Comment ‘Politics’ and I’ll personally DM you the full conversation.

Do you think the world is moving closer to a major global conflict?

In today’s episode, our guest is @adityasaidwhat, doctor and geopolitics speaker, breaking down global power, conflict, and strategy with blunt clarity.

Here’s what we discussed:
-Whether Russia can realistically reclaim superpower status and how close the world is to a NATO nuclear escalation
-Why Greenland has suddenly become geopolitically critical — and what global power players (including tech leaders) see in it
-The real significance of the India–EU “mother of all deals,” and what it could mean for India’s economy and consumers
-Why China and India are unlikely to ever be allies, and why Taiwan could become the next major global flashpoint
-How shifting US priorities, Iran sanctions, and weakening global institutions create warnings India cannot afford to ignore

Catch the full episode here:
YouTube Channel: Raj Shamani
Spotify Channel: Raj Shamani Figuring Out

Until then, keep figuring out! 🚀
